title: Travel announcements
explanation:
Travel announcements

Transcript

Announcement: Attention please. The ten fifteen train to Manchester is delayed by twenty minutes. It will now depart from platform four. Passengers for Leeds should change at York. We apologise for the delay.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: Passengers for Leeds should change at [*York| Manchester|London].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen again and choose the correct option.

questions.text: The train was scheduled for ten ____. | *fifteen | twenty | thirty
The announcement says 'We ____ for the delay.' | *apologise | leave | change
Passengers should change at York for ____. | *Leeds | Manchester | London
The train is ____, not cancelled. | *delayed | early | missing

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The departure platform [*changed|stayed the same|is unknown].
The tone of the announcement is [*formal|informal|angry].
Leeds passengers need to [*change trains|miss the train|walk].
